content.text:
*small laugh*

Yeah, I noticed that too. I think... there's a part of me that knows this isn't just about my boss. Like, intellectually I can trace the line pretty clearly — authority figure, older man, certain tone of voice — and I go somewhere else. But knowing the map isn't the same as walking the territory, right? So I guess the "I think" is about whether I'm actually ready to feel it, not just analyze it.
